name: BARTHOLIN GLAND CYST

demographics.Histo: lined by mucinous transitional cell / columnar epithelium
demographics.Location: posterolateral inferior ⅓ of vaginal introitus medial to labia minora at / below level

distribution: posterolateral inferior ⅓ of vaginal introitus medial to labia minora at / below level
discriminating_features: variable T1 hyperintensity depending on proteinaceous / mucinous contents

general: variable T1 hyperintensity depending on proteinaceous / mucinous contents

clinical.Rx: administration of silver nitrate; marsupialization; surgical excision
